Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025, Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 03/11/2025 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025,?
The Exam will be conducted in 07/07/2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025?
The last date to apply online is 03/12/2025.
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 03/12/2025 .
Q7. How can I apply for UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025 Online Form?
UPPSC Assistant Town Planner ATP Recruitment 2025 Apply Online .

UPPSC Assistant Town Planner Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2025 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per UPPSC Assistant Town Planner Examination 2025 Rule A-10/E-1/2025.
UPPSC Asst Town Planner Recruitment 2025 : Vacancy Details Total : 08 Post

Bachelor Degree OR PG Diploma in T & C Planning from any recognized institution. OR Associate Membership of any of the following institutions. (A) Institute of planners (India). (B) American institute of town planners. (C) Institute of Town Planners (London). OR Qualifications equivalent for membership of institute of Town planners (India) or London or America.
